message:
feat: add SSE streaming response support with chunk timing

Implement SSE (Server-Sent Events) streaming response capture for LLM
API proxy. This enables proper handling of streaming responses from
both Anthropic and OpenAI APIs, capturing individual chunks with
timestamps for timing analysis.

Key additions:
- StreamingResponseWriter wraps http.ResponseWriter to capture chunks
- extractDeltaText parses SSE data lines for both providers
- isStreamingResponse/isStreamingRequest detection helpers
- streamResponse handles streaming with proper flushing and logging
- Accumulated text extraction for future fingerprinting (Task 18)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
